proof: function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: Nat) { list_subsets[T0](x0).filter(function(x2: FiniteSet[T0]) { x2.cardinality_is(x1) }) = list_k_subsets[T0](x0, x1) }[A](items, k)

function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](fs_from_list[T0](x0)) = FiniteSet.new[T0](list_set[T0](x0)) }[FiniteSet[A]](list_k_subsets[A](items, k))

function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: lib(set).Set[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](x0) != FiniteSet.new[T0](x1) or x0.underlying_set = x1 }[FiniteSet[A]](fs_from_list[FiniteSet[A]](list_k_subsets[A](items, k)), list_set[FiniteSet[A]](list_k_subsets[A](items, k)))
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[FiniteSet[A]](fs_from_list[FiniteSet[A]](list_k_subsets[A](items, k)), t)

function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[A](FiniteSet.from_list[A](items), x)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[A](t, head)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { x0.underlying_set ⊂ x1.underlying_set = x0 ⊆ x1 }[A](t, FiniteSet.from_list[A](tail))
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[A](FiniteSet.from_list[A](tail), head)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { FiniteSet.new[T0](x0.underlying_set.insert(x1)) = Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](fs_insert[T0](x0, x1)) }[T](s, item)

function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](fs_insert(s, item), item)

function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(1, k)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { not x0.insert(x1).cardinality_is(x2.suc) or x0.cardinality_is(x2) or x1 ∈ x0 }[T](s, item, k)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { insert_into_subset[T0](x0, x1) = x1.insert(x0) }[A](head, s)

goal: map[FiniteSet[A], FiniteSet[A]](list_subsets[A](tail), insert_into_subset(head)).filter(function(x0: FiniteSet[A]) { x0.cardinality_is(k.suc) }).length = list_subsets[A](tail).filter(function(x1: FiniteSet[A]) { x1.cardinality_is(k) }).length
proof: let w0: FiniteSet[A] satisfy { w0 ∈ list_subsets[A](tail) and w0.cardinality_is(k) != insert_into_subset(head, w0).cardinality_is(k.suc) }
function(x0: FiniteSet[A]) { not x0 ∈ list_subsets[A](tail) or insert_into_subset(head, x0).cardinality_is(k.suc) = x0.cardinality_is(k) }(w0)

function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0]) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or list_subsets[T0](x1) + map[FiniteSet[T0], FiniteSet[T0]](list_subsets[T0](x1), insert_into_subset[T0](x0)) = list_subsets[T0](x2) }[A](head, lib(functions).identity_fn(tail), List.cons(head, lib(functions).identity_fn(tail)))
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[List[A]](tail)

goal: list_k_subsets[A](List.cons(head, tail), k.suc) = (left + right).filter(function(x0: FiniteSet[A]) { x0.cardinality_is(k.suc) })
proof: function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: Nat) { list_subsets[T0](x0).filter(function(x2: FiniteSet[T0]) { x2.cardinality_is(x1) }) = list_k_subsets[T0](x0, x1) }[A](List.cons(head, tail), k.suc)

goal: (left + right).filter(function(x0: FiniteSet[A]) { x0.cardinality_is(k.suc) }) = left.filter(function(x1: FiniteSet[A]) { x1.cardinality_is(k.suc) }) + right.filter(function(x2: FiniteSet[A]) { x2.cardinality_is(k.suc) })

proof: function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: Nat) { list_subsets[T0](x0).filter(function(x2: FiniteSet[T0]) { x2.cardinality_is(x1) }) = list_k_subsets[T0](x0, x1) }[A](tail, k.suc)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: Nat) { list_subsets[T0](x0).filter(function(x2: FiniteSet[T0]) { x2.cardinality_is(x1) }) = list_k_subsets[T0](x0, x1) }[A](tail, k)

goal: right.filter(function(x0: FiniteSet[A]) { x0.cardinality_is(k.suc) }).length = left.filter(function(x1: FiniteSet[A]) { x1.cardinality_is(k) }).length

list_k_subsets[A](List.cons(head, tail), k.suc).length = left.filter(function(x0: FiniteSet[A]) { x0.cardinality_is(k.suc) }).length + right.filter(function(x1: FiniteSet[A]) { x1.cardinality_is(k.suc) }).length
list_k_subsets[A](List.cons(head, tail), k.suc).length = list_k_subsets[A](tail, k.suc).length + list_k_subsets[A](tail, k).length
